original_image_tags: A piece of light-colored, lined index card or paper with punched holes at the top. The card contains a handwritten message in cursive script using dark ink.

elements.description: A piece of lined paper with handwritten cursive text in pencil. The text includes several lines of handwriting and a signature at the bottom right. Visible handwritten text includes: 'If that would been lookin to then', 'It might been a grate tiger now', 'I sent it to the Republic Partie', 'at Washington D.C.', 'F Roy Turner', '217 S maple ave', 'Oak Park Ill.' The paper has a hole punch on the left side, a dark stain or hole on the right side, and blue horizontal lines with a red vertical margin line on the right.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text and describes visual details (e.g., red margin line, stain/hole, pencil vs dark ink) that contradict or add unverifiable specifics to the simple description in A, indicating potential fabrication.
